description_long: This object consists of two hardcover books, one closed and one open, both with solid-colored covers. The open book reveals blank cream-colored pages with a single small photograph or illustration on the right page, depicting a landscape with mountains and a blue sky. The closed books have simple, unadorned covers—one in green and the other in blue—without any visible text or decoration. The spines are straight and clean, with no visible markings or embellishments. The books appear to be of standard size, suitable for reading or display on a shelf. The overall appearance is minimalistic and functional, with a focus on the books' form rather than decorative elements.
description: Two hardcover books, one open showing blank pages with a small landscape photo, and one closed with plain green and blue covers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with blank pages and a small landscape photo, and the spines of the two closed books behind it.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open book's interior and the green cover of the closed book.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the spines of both closed books and the open book's central crease.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the blue cover of the closed book and the open book's blank pages with the photo.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are solid blue and green with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. The design is plain and unembellished.
